headline: Friday discipline: close the gap or fall further behind.
summary: Today you're 5x slower than needed (-0.13 vs -0.66 kg/week); Friday snacking pressure hits hard—execute on eating discipline and intentional movement now.
details: Replace emotional snacking with 2-3 portioned Huel meals today; no free grazing. Get 30 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill before work ends—your sedentary job demands this daily non-negotiable. Friday is where weekends win or lose: every food choice today compounds through the weekend. You're 32.5 kg away from 88 kg with 347 days left. At current pace, you'll hit ~113 kg. That gap won't close itself.
